verified_behavior: The interface exposes select, preview, replace, remove, loading, and error states.
The update event is emitted only after the server-confirmed save callback.
The implemented validator and test reject files larger than 3 MB.
contradiction: The design documentation promises 5 MB while the validator and test enforce 3 MB.
repo_cannot_answer: Whether 3 MB is an intentional performance policy, a stale implementation, or a temporary provider limit.
decision: Do not change one value in isolation. Resolve the intended contract with product and engineering evidence, then update interface copy, validation, tests, and documentation together.
